## Checklist

- [ ] Domain logic stays in `lib/<domain>/service.ts` and respects module boundaries
- [ ] Billing or profitability changes update specs under `specs/domain/` when applicable
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` values, or demo credentials committed
- [ ] README / CONTRIBUTING updated if setup or workflow changed
